name: E-1 severity override: rule not present anywhere in the extends chain defaults to effective_severity=off + source=default
command: printf 'rules:\n  g-ts-002: error\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=off' err.txt && grep -q 'source=default' err.txt && grep -q 'rule_will_run=false' err.txt && echo defaulted 1>&2
